prestazioni: Full bolt-on S85B50 (5.0L V10) engine build with Schrick 284°/280° camshafts, custom 12.5:1 forged pistons by Mahle, and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 650+ WHP on E85 fuel with a Dinan Engineering Stage 4 ECU flash and custom Motec M150 standalone management

Garrett GT3582R turbocharger kit (twin-turbo conversion) with custom stainless steel exhaust manifolds by Active Autowerke, 4.0-inch downpipes, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 800+ WHP on 93 octane with supporting fuel system upgrades (Walbro 450 LPH pumps, ID1000 injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel surge tank)

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with adjustable camber plates, Eibach 30mm front and 25mm rear anti-roll bars, and polyurethane subframe bushings by 034 Motorsport for track-focused handling, paired with AP Racing CP9660 front brake calipers and 380mm two-piece rotors with Pagid RS29 pads
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and GT-style wing by Vorsteiner, finished in BMW Individual Frozen Gray metallic paint with matte black accents

OEM+ M6-style front bumper with custom LED angel eyes by LUX H8 V4, smoked side markers, and a carbon fiber kidney grille set by AC Schnitzer, paired with a custom rear bumper featuring integrated quad exhaust tips by Eisenmann

Full interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats in black Nappa leather with red stitching, M-Tech steering wheel with Alcantara grip, and a custom roll cage by Wiechers Sport wrapped in matching Alcantara, paired with a digital dash display by MSS60 Pro
